message:
test(fuzz): add regression corpus replay seed determinism verification

Adds a new test (regression_corpus_replay_seeds_preserve_violation_categories)
that validates the core contract of the fuzz regression corpus: replay
seeds must produce the same violation categories, certificate hashes,
and trace fingerprints across repeated executions.

The test:
1. Runs a fuzz harness with a known seed, workers, and minimization
2. Converts findings to a regression corpus
3. For each corpus case, replays the seed and verifies:
   - The replay still produces violations (no silent regression fix)
   - Violation categories match the corpus entry exactly
   - A second replay produces identical certificate_hash and
     trace_fingerprint (deterministic replay guarantee)

This catches cases where fuzz corpus entries become stale or where
the replay mechanism introduces nondeterminism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
